title: GSC Validate Fix Decision Audit — Phase 16.11
data_source: Reconstructed from known V2 prune + site architecture (no GSC API access — token dead)

issue_groups.estimated_count: ~2,000+ (V2 cleanup lag from pruned scenarios, geo pages, formula tools)
issue_groups.root_cause: V2 correction (May 28): mass noindex of low-quality pages. Google DISCOVERED these URLs from old sitemaps/internal links before they were noindexed. They are now blocked by noindex tags.
issue_groups.root_cause_fixed: YES — May 28: noindex tags applied. Sitemaps cleaned. Scenario sitemap removed from GSC.
issue_groups.reason: These are INTENTIONAL noindex pages. Google will naturally drop them from the index over time. Clicking 'Validate Fix' on intentional noindex pages is WRONG — it tells Google to re-check pages that are SUPPOSED to be excluded. Let the natural cleanup process run.
issue_groups.risk_of_validating: MEDIUM — Google may recrawl noindexed pages, consuming crawl budget on pages we want excluded
issue_groups.risk_of_not_validating: NONE — Google naturally drops discovered-not-indexed URLs over 3-6 months. This is normal cleanup lag.
issue_groups.action: DO NOT VALIDATE. Monitor counts monthly — should decrease over time.

issue_groups.estimated_count: ~500-800 (lower-priority pages Google crawled but chose not to index)
sample_urls: Some tool variants that Google crawled but deemed thin
Some guide pages crawled before canonical fix (Jun 3)
Old scenario pages that were crawled before noindex applied
issue_groups.root_cause: Google crawled these pages but chose not to index them. Likely reasons: low quality signal at time of crawl, thin content, or crawled before improvements were made.
issue_groups.root_cause_fixed: PARTIALLY — Guide pages fixed (canonical added Jun 3). Tool variants mixed (some indexable, some formula-variant noindexed).
issue_groups.are_urls_important: MAYBE — some could be important tool variants or improved guide pages
issue_groups.is_cleanup_lag: MIXED — some cleanup, some genuine quality issues
issue_groups.reason: Without GSC access to see which specific URLs are in this group, we cannot distinguish cleaned-up pages from genuinely low-quality ones. Some URLs may have been improved (guide canonical fixes, new content) but we don't know WHICH are in the group. Blind validation risks re-requesting indexing on thin pages.
issue_groups.risk_of_validating: HIGH — Google re-crawls thin pages, waste crawl budget, potentially hurts site quality score
issue_groups.risk_of_not_validating: LOW — improved pages will naturally be recrawled via sitemap + internal links
issue_groups.action: HOLD until GSC token is fixed and specific URL list can be audited. Then: validate ONLY if >80% of URLs are now improved and indexable. Otherwise let natural recrawl handle it.
issue_groups.when_to_revisit: After GSC token fixed + CloakBrowser GSC UI access restored

issue_groups.root_cause: V2 quality control — mass noindex of low-quality, non-localized, and thin-content pages
issue_groups.root_cause_fixed: YES — these pages are SUPPOSED to be noindexed
issue_groups.reason: These pages are INTENTIONALLY noindexed. 'Validate Fix' is for pages where the noindex was a MISTAKE that has been corrected. These noindex tags are correct and intentional.
issue_groups.risk_of_validating: CRITICAL — would tell Google the noindex was wrong, potentially re-indexing 3,000+ low-quality pages and severely damaging site quality
issue_groups.risk_of_not_validating: NONE — intentional noindex pages SHOULD remain excluded
issue_groups.action: DO NOT VALIDATE. Never. These pages are correctly excluded.

sample_urls: Old scenario slugs that were pruned and not redirected
issue_groups.root_cause: Pages removed during V2 cleanup. Dashboard/auth pages intentionally removed. Old scenarios pruned.
issue_groups.root_cause_fixed: YES — pages removed from sitemap, not linked internally
issue_groups.should_validate_fix: YES — for pages we're SURE are permanently removed and not linked
issue_groups.reason: 404 pages that are permanently gone and have no internal links SHOULD be validated. Google will confirm the 404 and drop them from reporting. This cleans up the GSC dashboard.
issue_groups.risk_of_validating: LOW — Google checks, confirms 404, removes from report. Only risk is if we accidentally include a page that exists but was temporarily misconfigured.
issue_groups.risk_of_not_validating: LOW — cosmetic. 404s naturally drop from reports over time.
issue_groups.action: SAFE TO VALIDATE if we can confirm the specific URLs are genuinely dead. WITHOUT GSC ACCESS to see the exact list, hold until token fixed.
issue_groups.when_to_validate: After GSC token + CloakBrowser GSC UI restored → verify specific 404 URLs → click Validate Fix on confirmed dead pages only

issue_groups.group: Alternative page with proper canonical tag
issue_groups.estimated_count: ~400+ (tool variants and other pages canonicalized to parent calculators)
sample_urls: Other tool variants canonicalized to parent calculators
issue_groups.root_cause: V2 canonicalization — tool variants point to parent calculators as canonical
issue_groups.is_cleanup_lag: NORMAL — this is expected canonical behavior, not an issue
issue_groups.reason: Alternative page with canonical is NORMAL and CORRECT behavior. These are not errors — Google is correctly identifying that the canonical version is the parent calculator. Do not validate.
issue_groups.risk_of_validating: MEDIUM — may cause Google to reconsider the canonical relationship
issue_groups.action: DO NOT VALIDATE. This is correct canonical behavior.

issue_groups.root_cause: Intentional redirects set up during site cleanup
issue_groups.reason: Redirects are intentional. These are not errors.
issue_groups.risk_of_validating: LOW — Google will confirm the redirect
issue_groups.action: DO NOT VALIDATE unless count is abnormally high (>100). Redirects are normal.

validate_after_token_fix: Not found (404) — only confirmed dead pages
never_validate: Discovered — currently not indexed (intentional noindex cleanup lag)
Alternative page with proper canonical tag (correct behavior)
hold_until_audited: Crawled — currently not indexed (need URL-level audit before deciding)
overall_recommendation.blocker: GSC TOKEN DEAD — cannot see specific URLs in each group. Blind validation is DANGEROUS. Wait for token fix.
overall_recommendation.cosmetic_note: The 'last updated 29/05' date on these groups is cosmetic. GSC reports lag behind actual crawl state. The V2 prune was May 28 — the 29/05 date likely reflects the last time GSC ran its batch processing, not the last time pages changed.

qaesm_action_required: After token fixed, Hermes can use CloakBrowser to inspect 'Not found (404)' group and safely Validate Fix on confirmed dead pages
DO NOT click Validate Fix blindly on any group before Hermes reviews specific URLs
